summary: SPK RC 33 kiem tra FFmpeg usable that su cho worker/API va chan release SPK thieu codec can cho proxy.
changes: Worker inline va API gio tu probe decoder/encoder can thiet truoc khi dung ffmpeg, nen se khong coi binary DSM bi cat H.264/AAC la runtime hop le nua.
Transcode runtime message tren SPK gio noi ro worker dang roi vao sim mode vi thieu FFmpeg usable cho HLS proxy, thay vi chi bao heartbeat cu mo ho.
Pipeline build SPK duoc bo sung buoc bundle ffmpeg va canh bao khi release build khong kem ffmpeg, de tranh lap lai ban SPK khong transcode duoc.
